rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The plan agent wasted 30 turns reading the 658KB compiled engine CLI from node_modules instead of checking whether project source files exist first.","scope":"pipeline planning"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Kody pipeline metadata lives in .kody-engine/, .kody/, .kody/, .agents/, and skills-lock.json — commits may contain only these files.","scope":"pipeline metadata"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"When verifying features that live in compiled npm packages, check node_modules for the compiled artifact and inspect it directly rather than assuming local src/ files exist.","scope":"engine verification"},{"kind":"decision","text":"The --feedback flag is parsed at line 17529, stored in ctx.input.feedback at line 19246, and logged as feedback: during the build stage at lines 14742–14743 — all in the compiled engine CLI.","scope":"--feedback flag implementation"}]}
